rows.label: qev056105_MSG0001
rows.name:
Are you On'otonam's messenger?
Hehe, look at this beautiful beast.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev056105_MSG0002
rows.name:
Possessing a ferocity that could devour everything,
yet hinting at a spark of intelligence deep within.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev056105_MSG0003
rows.name:
Hiding a sort of primal nostalgia
beneath its overwhelming presence.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev056105_MSG0004
rows.name:
The gods and demons that Earthlings revere and fear
must refer to beings such as this.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev056105_JNK0010
rows.name: Persuade[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev056105_SEL0011
rows.name:
Persuade her to run away immediately
because it is dangerous.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev056105_JNK0020
rows.name: Observe[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev056105_SEL0021
rows.name: Become mesmerized by the beautiful beast alongside her.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev056105_MSG0005
rows.name:
The Ovah within me has also been urging me to run
ever since I entered this forest.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev056105_MSG0006
rows.name:
But if I do that...
I will never reach the "something" the Ovah abnormally fears.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev056105_MSG0007
rows.name: It truly is a mysterious beast...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev056105_MSG0008
rows.name:
...Even if it meant defying the voice of the Ovah continuing
to urge me to run, I am glad I came here...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev056105_MSG0009
rows.name:
I am certain that deep within this forest, there is a "something"
crucial to us—[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev056105_MSG0010
rows.name: A massive "something" that strikes such fear into the Ovah.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev056105_MSG0011
rows.name:
We have to know.
The meaning of our birth, the truth of this world.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev056105_MSG0012
rows.name:
Even if it means defying the Ovah.
Even if it costs me my life.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev056105_MSG0013
rows.name: I must... move forward.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev056105_MSG0014
rows.name: Please pass this message to On'otonam.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev056105_MSG0015
rows.name:
We must become able to control the Ovah,
rather than being controlled by it. Otherwise,
there is no future for us—[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev056105_MSG0016
rows.name:
Please guide our comrades so they can effectively use
this wonderful power.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev056105_MSG0018
rows.name:
And also...
Thank you for giving birth to me.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev056105_MSG0019
rows.name:
Ah... just as I thought...
The Ovah saw that moment, didn't it...![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev056105_MSG0020
rows.name:
The truth from long before we were born,
colored by this beautiful beast—[ST:wait ]
